options.content:
## ⚠️ Research project — NOT an official Indonesian government weather station

This dashboard displays sensor readings from a research deployment operated in cooperation with local partners (PMI, IPB). The data shown here is **not** authoritative weather or hydrological information and **must not be used for emergency response, planning, or official reporting**. Real-time conditions may differ significantly from what is shown. For official weather and flood data, consult BMKG (`bmkg.go.id`) and BNPB (`bnpb.go.id`).

*Proyek penelitian — bukan stasiun cuaca resmi pemerintah Indonesia.*

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(ts, $__interval),
  AVG(value) AS "Outside temp"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND station = '${station}'
  AND sensor = 'ds18b20'
  AND metric = 'temp_c'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(ts, $__interval),
  AVG(value) AS "Enclosure interior temp"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND station = '${station}'
  AND sensor = 'sht40'
  AND metric = 'temp_c'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(ts, $__interval),
  AVG(value) AS "Enclosure interior humidity"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND station = '${station}'
  AND sensor = 'sht40'
  AND metric = 'humidity_pct'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Rainfall per reporting interval — $station (RG-15)
panels.description: interval_mm = rain (mm) measured since previous reading; summed within each chart-time bucket so the bar height reflects total rain in that window

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(ts, $__interval),
  SUM(value) AS "Rainfall (interval)"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND station = '${station}'
  AND sensor = 'rg15'
  AND metric = 'interval_mm'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Rainfall — current event accumulation — $station (RG-15)
panels.description: acc_mm = mm of rain accumulated in the current rain event; resets when the gauge detects the event has ended

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(ts, $__interval),
  MAX(value) AS "Event accumulation"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND station = '${station}'
  AND sensor = 'rg15'
  AND metric = 'acc_mm'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Rainfall — total accumulation since reset — $station (RG-15)
panels.description: totalacc_mm = monotonically increasing total mm of rain since the gauge's last total reset

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(ts, $__interval),
  MAX(value) AS "Total accumulation"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND station = '${station}'
  AND sensor = 'rg15'
  AND metric = 'totalacc_mm'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

list.name: station
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT station AS __text, station AS __value FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY station
list.label: Station
